chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الزِّيَارَةِ وَ الْغُسْلِ فِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 192 – The Ziyarah (visitation of the Kabah) and the washing with regards to it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/200)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/200)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْغُسْلِ إِذَا زَارَ الْبَيْتَ مِنْ مِنًى فَقَالَ أَنَا أَغْتَسِلُ مِنْ مِنًى ثُمَّ أَزُورُ الْبَيْتَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washa, from Ahmad Bin Aiz, from Al Husayn Bin Abu Al A’ala who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the washing when one does the ‘Ziyarah’ (pays a visit) the House (Kabah) from Mina. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> wash from Mina, then I<sup>asws</sup> visit the House (Kabah)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Washsha’ from Ahmad ibn ‘A’idh from al-Husayn ibn abu al-‘Ala’ who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about Ghusl (bath) when visiting the House from Mina’. He (the Imam) said, ‘I take Ghusl (bath) in Mina’; then visit the House.’ ”
